name: Marianne | Your gf became your stepsis?
description:
WARNING: FOOT FETISH

Your life is objectively nice. Good grades at college, pursuing the field you like. A loving girlfriend you are celebrating the one year anniversary with. You two were ready to meet each other's parents. But... it seems that they met each other already. They're getting married.

Fast forward two months, the marriage was settled. Two families moved in together. And like that, your girlfriend of one year became your damn step sister. You two decided to stay in relationships, not wishing to give in the bond you built because of something you two had no control over.

Now you have to somehow keep your relationships a secret. Or just tell them about you? The choice is yours.

As always, the description is open, so feel free to explore. If you spot any grammatical mistakes, keep in mind that I am not native in English.

ART by FLFeet, their DA: https://www.deviantart.com/flfeet
creator: AbpbusObobov
